title: Oil prices post weekly loss as U.S. and Iran signal progress toward a deal
summary_full: The U.S. and Iran have signaled progress in talks to end the war, but the warring sides remain at loggerheads over key issues.
summary_public: The U.S. and Iran have signaled progress in talks to end the war, but the warring sides remain at loggerheads over key issues.
